- Brought down a large beast early this morning. Tall and long, it ran on two legs and used its heavy tail as a counterbalance for its heavy head. From the teeth and the hide, it seemed to be an older specimen. This was another new one, so once we finish cleaning it, we'll preserve the remains to be studied.    - Spotted the tracks of another, footprints much wider and flatter. We will try to pick up the trail before dusk, and we will continue the search tomorrow if needed.    - Spotted a different kind of tracks by the stream today. Heavy and bipedal, likely an Inquest golem. They hadn't accounted for ground pressure, and it nearly sank into the mud. Fools have no idea what they're doing on terrain like this.

- First and foremost, never look a journeykin directly in the eye. Not until you've bonded. Doing so too early will provoke the creature. Until a bond has been established, keep your eyes on the creature's chin while slowly blinking.    - Journeykin are not known to attack on sight unless provoked. Patience and exposure is key, as it may take weeks for the journeykin to acclimate if it hasn't been exposed to the bearkin before.    - If the wild journeykin is protecting kits, move away immediately. New mothers will not take kindly to any intrusion. Inform a journeykin trainer immediately if wild kits are found.    - The quickest way to a journeykin's heart is the stomach. Bring dried meat for every encounter.    - Just as bonded journeykin do, wild journeykin respond well to being spoken to. Keep your voice low, soft, and calm during your initial interactions.    - Wild journeykin tend to travel and hunt on their own, but they will linger in areas where they know others are present. If one is in distress, the others may come. Similarly, if a journeykin had bonded with a bearkin, others familiar with its smell may be easier to bond with.

- Ten crates of fresh berries, able to be preserved.  - Six boxes of squash and pumpkin, still unpreserved. Discuss options with Vigilant Dawn.  - Ready supply of moa meat at the sites noted below—**DO NOT overfarm.**  - Supplies expected a week ago from Coursing Upland—check in with Ebbing Tide.  - Fresh water available through Astral Ward's method of removing salt from water. (DO NOT rely on this—keep backup fresh water handy.)  - Three large jars of fermented cabbage. The cubs don't like it, but they'll survive.    *The report goes on for several more pages.*

...amazing he's survived this long without being discovered. After the crackup, we'd assumed they'd all be rounded up......he's got some sort of special ability to stay above it all, Zal. Yeongi has decided to lend him sanctuary in our temporary headquarters......moving off the main peninsula soon......scouting for new locations to set up camp. Currently in an old outpost near the city...too close for comfort. Moving further into the ruins for now. One of the search parties found a decent spot in the mountains in Shing Jea...

...And please, don't be so quick to dismiss the proposed alliance with the Speakers, my love. What you face is a different beast, and I want you home, safe. Swallow your pride and return to me. And if not for me, then for our child. Yes, our pleas to Soo-Won have been answered. What I would give to see your face as you read this. I would smother it in kisses...Please please return, my love. My heart screams it a thousand times.Know this. You are not fighting an otherworldly beast anymore. You are fighting for our family. For the future we dreamt of, ever since we were first wed.Touch your hand to your chest and know I am with you.—Sanda xxx

...I have decided to leave my diary behind. Maybe someone will find it in years to come and know that a family once lived here. Just a regular family. Two sisters, and parents who loved them more than the world. They tried so hard to protect us from the dire truth as it crept closer daily. But we always knew—of course we pretended we didn't. And it broke our hearts to watch them softy crying together late on so many nights, thinking we were sound asleep. Of course, what is a child's place if it isn't at the top of the landing, eavesdropping.May the gods protect us tomorrow on our journey north, and keep us together. Always.—Annika

...the brat thinks he can lord his position over us. That's not how it works, even if you're two hundred years old. I don't care if he's the Minister of Fire or the Minister of Kappa, I won't "respect my elders" if it means bending at the knee to some dried-up husk......he may have kissed Reiko's feet, but that doesn't mean he deserves my respect now......of Purity has nothing to do with rank or title, it's about genes. It's about one's ability to command. Not just their power, but their prowess. Over the people of Cantha...

...to find out soon. Gold Serpent can't keep this hidden much longer if he has any hope ofsurviving. Of course, maybe he's trying to be sneaky and signal some of his old allies......unsure of what he does when he leaves the outpost. Says it has something to do with an "offering" to the Celestials...barely got a flicker of flame left, so maybe he's looking for a little more fuel......blood along the path. ...vault doors will not open, even when unlocked, without the presence of the souls that I bound to it......obelisk will start glowing when the two souls are near. A simple turn of the key will open the lock and allow access into......should the enchantment fail, the violent removal of the attuned owners' souls from this plane will temporarily grant access to the vault. Please note that this fix is temporary, as the enchantment will reset should the souls of the attuned wander back to their place of death......the door will only open by their will. Should it be their will to leave this world, so be it......Lady Iaera...

...Zal wasn't doing well when we arrived, so it's no surprise he was one of the casualties. He was too weak, anyway. Lost a lot of blood......of Purity waits for no man, we must press on and fight back against this Canthan genocide......let this be a call to arms, to blood. No Canthan is safe from Haebaragi's self-righteous hand. No minister. We will see the loss of our nation if we don't act; so we march. Tonight...

1. A life spent straying from the path of Joko is one not even worth Awakening.2. Nobody crossed the Desolation in a single day. Except Joko.3. Madness is a poor substitute for magnificence.4. To know Joko is to praise Joko; to praise Joko is to know Joko.5. Mercy speaks to a lack of imagination.6. Before making any major life decision, pause. Ask yourself if it will please Joko. If no is your answer, then you know your answer.7. All are created equally inferior to Joko.8. There is nothing in existence so tedious as mediocrity.9. If you want to be bored, follow a gourd.10. There is only one Golden Rule. Do unto others in whatever way serves Joko.

1330 AE    Lazarus is dead. A ripple passed through the veil when it happened. I felt both acutely self-aware and overcome with the unshakable sensation that I had forgotten to do something. Nothing that would alter time or fate, but something that would be disappointing should I remember the task. It shook me in a gentle way, reminding me of—or lightly threatening me with—what I left behind. Before I could question it, Lady Livia delivered the news.    Thousands of years of watching us die out, and I am the only mursaat in Tyria. The pit in my gut holds little remorse. That part of me died long, long ago, back when the tower was inhabited by myself, Isgarren, and his ideas. To me, Lazarus was the last.    I felt the Eye one last time, in those flickering moments before it evaporated from reality to follow the "final mursaat." Never successful in its attempt to find me—although it'd come close from time to time. Whether my ascension painted my aura neutral, or the spire's gentle buzz shielded me from sight, I'll never know. But now, I don't need to.    I wonder if they know?
1330.189.642.1 Z.O.X.    1) M.O.X. departed.    2) Spiders controlled.    3) Brave heroes walked among us.    <end report>

13th of MikanImplant is acting up again. Seems to happen a lot more this past year, but I don't see a pattern. Nuna suggested keeping this journal.15th of MikanThis sounds crazy, but I think...my implant is reacting to the power fluctuations. Doesn't make any sense... What does my implant have to do with the power grid? Need to gather more data.29th of MikanConfirmed that my implant does malfunction when we have a significant loss of power in the grid. There's some connection. Something to do with jade tech in general. That's the only explanation...17th of NemnaiSupervisor didn't listen to me. Said that my "personal problems" had nothing to do with the company. Or jade tech. Called me a liar! Threatened me with termination. I don't know where else to turn.

1630 CC...for years we've felt Ione's subterranean murmurs, upset that her people turned away from her.1643 CC...offerings to Ione still go unanswered. Regardless, people have grown accustomed to the occasional tremor. I have even heard of parents in the surrounds hastening their children to bed under the threat that they might wake her.1660 CCI start my 30th year as the keeper of this journal, and I will now risk everything by saying that after my own research, I do not believe Ione has been speaking to us. These tremors could well have a different origin...

1820 CCYesterday I found a batch of peculiar jade in mother's latest payload. It held a charge—a magic I've never seen before. She confirmed that she had never seen anything like it either. They'd just broken ground in a new location southwest of the Harvest Temple, and all the jade had come from there.On a lark, I replaced the amber core in my lantern with a piece of the jade—the result nearly blinded me! The radiance was so intense! I made some adjustments and found that I had to reduce the flow of magic from the stone by a factor of approximately twelve for it to become bearable.A factor of twelve! What could we achieve with that kind of power?

1830 CCIn the Matter of the Petition of XUNLAI CORP for Approval of EXCLUSIVE MINING RIGHTS, JADE SEA Pursuant to M.L.U.C. 18:3–34This document recognizes that XUNLAI JADE CORP has acquired all assets and land rights previously belonging to SILVER DAWN MINING GROUP. This document further certifies exclusive mining rights in the JADE SEA REGION to XUNLAI JADE CORP. These rights will be held for a period of no less than ninety-nine years, unless a formal petition for their cancellation is brought before the Ministry of Land Management for approval, and further approved by the Imperial Court.Certified in the honorable presence of,Minister KyeMinister of Land ManagementOn behalf ofThe Most Radiant Empress Ihn

1835 CCThat's it. It's done. The reactor is sealed, and Soo-Won is resting. I made a few final adjustments, and then the power began to flow into hundreds of pieces of waiting jade. Not a moment too soon—the survey team has not been able to find a single new deposit of charged dragonjade in months, and our stores have dwindled. Now every piece of the Jade Sea can be utilized, not only those previously touched by Soo-Won's presence.Production is set to begin immediately on our new budget-friendly line. Now that there's no longer a need to ration the dragonjade, I will finally be able to fulfill my promise of bringing jade technology to everyone, not just the lucky few.
